CONTENT.Club career: Kinareykin is a product of the Metalist Kharkiv and Dnipro-1 academies.Kinareykin made his debut for Dnipro-1 on 25 July 2023, playing as a first choice goalkeeper in a losing match against Greek club Panathinaikos in the 2023–24 UEFA Champions League qualifying phase round.
CONTENT.External links: Yakiv Kinareykin at SoccerwayYakiv Kinareykin at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)
CONTENT.International career: In November 2022, Kinareykin was called up for the first time to the Ukraine under-21 team as a main squad player, ahead of friendly matches vs Israel under-21 and Georgia under-21.

SUMMARY: Yakiv Dmytrovych Kinareykin (Ukrainian: Яків Дмитрович Кінарейкін; born 22 October 2003) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Karpaty Lviv.
